name: Memsy
description: Long-term memory for OpenClaw agents — recall past decisions, store context, and surface the right information across all connected channels.

apiKey.description: Memsy API key (alternative to MEMSY_API_KEY env var)

sessionAutoContext.description: Inject recent memories at session start

sessionContextLimit.description: Number of memories to surface at session start (1-20)

proactive.description: Watch for save-worthy content (preferences, decisions, plans) and store without needing an explicit 'remember that'

confirmStore.description: Ask for confirmation before storing each memory
